title: Generative Adversarial Network Based Anomaly Detection for Software Defect Prediction
authors: Aradhana Soni, James Ostrowski, Anahita Khojandi
abstract: Predicting software defects effectively is crucial for high-quality software development. Traditionally, defect prediction has relied on supervised techniques, limited by data availability. This paper applies a new Generative Adversarial Network-based technique for detecting anomalies (GAN-AN), tailored to early defect identification in software development. Our technique, which detects defects as anomalies, is compared against three established methods: autoencoder, isolation forest, and one-class support vector machine (OCSVM). Our experimentation, utilizing five datasets from the NASA Promise repository, shows GAN-AN to be superior, with improvements of 7 % in precision-recall area under the curve (PR-AUC) and a significant 20 % in F1 score over previous techniques. Further evaluation using validation datasets reveals that while GAN-AN's overall performance was not uniformly superior, it notably outperformed isolation forest and OCSVM in recall on several datasets. This underscores GAN-AN's potential in specific contexts where recall is critical and highlights the importance of context-specific model selection. Our investigation also reveals that performance metrics vary among models, suggesting that the most effective model may vary depending on the dataset and specific detection goals.
title_zh: 基于生成对抗网络的软件缺陷预测异常检测
abstract_zh: 有效预测软件缺陷对于高质量的软件开发至关重要。传统上，缺陷预测依赖于监督学习技术，但受限于数据可用性。本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络的异常检测新方法（GAN-AN），专门用于软件开发早期缺陷的识别。该方法将缺陷视为异常进行检测，并与三种成熟的方法——自编码器、孤立森林和一类支持向量机（OCSVM）——进行了对比。通过使用NASA Promise数据仓库中的五个数据集进行实验，结果表明GAN-AN表现更优，在精确率-召回率曲线下面积（PR-AUC）上提升了7%，F1分数更是显著提高了20%。进一步利用验证数据集的评估显示，尽管GAN-AN的整体性能并非在所有情况下均占优势，但在多个数据集上其召回率明显优于孤立森林和OCSVM。这凸显了GAN-AN在召回率至关重要的特定场景下的潜力，也强调了根据具体情境选择模型的重要性。此外，我们的研究还发现不同模型的性能指标存在差异，表明最有效的模型可能因数据集和具体的检测目标而异。

title: Accelerating Enterprise Application Development Through AI-Enhanced Low-Code Platforms: An Empirical Analysis of Oracle APEX with Generative AI Integration
authors: Mohankrishna Kothapalli, Dharanidhar Vuppu
abstract: Low-code platforms promise faster application delivery, but rigorous empirical evidence remains scarce. We conducted exploratory multi-study experiments with 12 professional developers and 20 business analysts to evaluate Oracle APEX with Select AI integration. Our findings reveal substantial productivity gains: developers completed equivalent functionality significantly faster than with ReactJS (mean speedup <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$37 \times$</tex>, though this ratio reflects both platform abstraction and AI benefits), writing 95 % less code. When we tested Select AI's natural language query capabilities across 1,250 queries, GPT4 achieved 71 % accuracy while Cohere and Oracle's models reached 64 % and 61 % respectively. Security testing with 140 adversarial prompts showed Row-Level Security blocked 96% of attacks. Business analysts with no Structured Query Language (SQL) training completed 78 % of data access tasks successfully using natural language alone. These exploratory results suggest AI-enhanced low-code platforms offer significant potential for enterprise development, warranting larger-scale replication studies.
title_zh: 通过AI增强的低代码平台加速企业应用开发：基于生成式AI集成的Oracle APEX实证分析
abstract_zh: 低代码平台承诺实现更快的应用交付，但严谨的实证证据仍然稀缺。我们对12名专业开发人员和20名业务分析师进行了探索性多研究实验，评估了集成Select AI的Oracle APEX平台。研究结果表明，生产效率显著提升：与使用ReactJS相比，开发人员完成同等功能所需时间平均加快了37倍（该倍数既反映了平台抽象的优势，也体现了AI带来的增益），且代码量减少了95%。在对Select AI的自然语言查询能力进行测试时，针对1,250个查询，GPT4的准确率达到71%，而Cohere和Oracle自研模型的准确率分别为64%和61%。通过140个对抗性提示进行安全测试显示，行级安全机制成功阻止了96%的攻击。即使没有结构化查询语言（SQL）培训的业务分析师，仅依靠自然语言也成功完成了78%的数据访问任务。这些初步结果表明，融合人工智能的低代码平台在企业级开发中具有巨大潜力，值得开展更大规模的重复性研究以进一步验证。

title: Engineering Management for AI-Driven Software Quality Assurance: Practices, Challenges, and Future Direction
authors: Srinivas Reddy Kosna, Subba Rao Katragadda
abstract: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) into software systems has introduced unprecedented complexities and opportunities for quality assurance. This paper explores the evolving landscape of software quality engineering management in the age of AI. It examines the critical challenges and best practices for managing the quality of AI-driven software, from data acquisition to model deployment and maintenance. We present a comprehensive framework that synthesizes established software engineering principles with emerging machine learning (ML) development lifecycles. The paper analyzes key engineering management practices, including automated test generation, defect prediction, and continuous model validation, drawing on case studies and industry research. Furthermore, it discusses the future of AI in quality assurance, highlighting the potential of Large Language Models (LLMs) and knowledge graphs to enable more autonomous and intelligent testing paradigms. This paper aims to provide a valuable resource for engineering managers, QA professionals, and researchers navigating the transition to AI-centric software development.
title_zh: 面向人工智能驱动的软件质量保证的工程管理：实践、挑战与未来方向
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）融入软件系统，为质量保障带来了前所未有的复杂性与机遇。本文探讨了人工智能时代软件质量工程管理的演进格局，深入分析了从数据获取到模型部署与维护全生命周期中，管理AI驱动软件质量所面临的重大挑战与最佳实践。我们提出一个综合性框架，将传统的软件工程原则与新兴的机器学习（ML）开发生命周期相融合。通过案例研究和行业调研，本文剖析了关键的工程管理实践，包括自动化测试生成、缺陷预测以及持续模型验证。此外，文章还展望了人工智能在质量保障中的未来发展方向，重点阐述了大型语言模型（LLMs）与知识图谱在实现更自主、更智能的测试范式方面的潜力。本文旨在为工程管理者、质量保证专业人士及研究人员在迈向以AI为核心的软件开发转型过程中，提供一份有价值的参考资源。

title: Development of a Gomoku System Based on 2D Array Modeling and Algorithm Optimization
authors: Wenmin Rui, Shengsheng Liu
publish: 2026 5th International Symposium on Computer Applications and Information Technology (ISCAIT)
abstract: Taking the engineering development of digital games as the core, focusing on key technologies such as two-dimensional array modeling, four-direction scanning optimization algorithm and modular programming, the efficient development path of Gobang system is constructed. Based on Python 3.9 + and Pygame 2.1 + environment, this paper designs a four-stage engineering mode of ' demand analysis-algorithm design-modular implementation-system test ', completes the digital modeling of 15 <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\times 15$</tex> chessboard, clarifies the design of draw decision logic and boundary fault tolerance mechanism, reduces the time complexity of winning algorithm from <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathrm{O} 15 \times 15 \times 4 \times 15$</tex> to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathrm{O} 7 \times 7 \times 4 \times 5$</tex>, and realizes the development of full-function system. Through 80 sets of development sample control tests (the experimental group adopts the optimized path, and the control group is traditional linear development), the results show that the code reuse rate of the experimental group is increased by 37.2 %, the algorithm execution efficiency is increased by 41.5 %, the functional integrity compliance rate is increased by 28.6 %, the module coupling degree is reduced by <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$65.5 \%(\mathrm{p}<0.001)$</tex>, and the abnormal error rate is reduced from 12.3 % to 3.1 %. The technical solution is suitable for the development of small and medium-sized digital games, and provides a reusable paradigm for the landing of core computer technology in interactive applications.
title_zh: 基于二维数组建模与算法优化的五子棋系统开发
abstract_zh: 以数字游戏的工程化开发为核心，聚焦二维数组建模、四向扫描优化算法及模块化编程等关键技术，构建了五子棋系统的高效开发路径。基于Python 3.9+与Pygame 2.1+开发环境，本文设计了“需求分析—算法设计—模块实现—系统测试”四阶段工程模式，完成了15×15棋盘的数字化建模，明确了平局判定逻辑与边界容错机制的设计方案，将胜局判断算法的时间复杂度由原来的O(15×15×4×15)优化至O(7×7×4×5)，实现了完整功能系统的开发。通过80组开发样本控制实验（实验组采用优化开发路径，对照组为传统线性开发），结果表明：实验组代码复用率提升37.2%，算法执行效率提高41.5%，功能完整性符合率提升28.6%，模块耦合度降低65.5%（p<0.001），异常错误率由12.3%降至3.1%。该技术方案适用于中小型数字游戏的开发，为计算机核心技术在交互式应用中的落地提供了可复用的工程范式。

title: Leveraging Llms for Functional Clustering of Microservices
authors: Santiago Di Sabatto, Guillermo Rodriguez, Claudia Marcos, Santiago Vidal
publish: 2025 IEEE CHILEAN Conference on Electrical, Electronics Engineering, Information and Communication Technologies (CHILECON)
abstract: Microservices architectures often suffer from fragmentation and complexity, making system maintenance, scalability, and evolution increasingly difficult. A key challenge in this context is how to effectively group microservices into coherent functional modules. This paper proposes a novel approach for the functional grouping of microservices using Large Language Models (lLMs) and clustering techniques. Our methodology combines semantic and structural analysis of microservices based on their OpenAPI specifications and was validated using real-world microservice datasets. The results demonstrate that integrating semantic and structural similarities leads to more coherent and manageable groupings. Furthermore, leveraging ChatGPT to generate missing endpoint descriptions significantly improved clustering accuracy, achieving a 60 % higher success rate compared to methods without automatic description generation. Our findings suggest that the proposed approach not only enhances the maintainability and scalability of microservice architectures but also streamlines development and deployment workflows, offering a scalable and efficient solution for service organization.
title_zh: 利用大语言模型进行微服务的功能聚类
abstract_zh: 微服务架构常常面临碎片化和复杂性问题，导致系统维护、可扩展性和演进日益困难。在此背景下，一个关键挑战是如何有效将微服务分组为逻辑一致的功能模块。本文提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLMs）与聚类技术的新型微服务功能分组方法。我们的方法结合了基于OpenAPI规范的微服务语义分析与结构分析，并通过真实世界微服务数据集进行了验证。结果表明，融合语义相似性与结构相似性的方法能够生成更加一致且易于管理的分组。此外，利用ChatGPT自动生成缺失的端点描述显著提升了聚类准确性，相比未采用自动描述生成的方法，成功率达到60%的提升。研究结果表明，所提出的方案不仅增强了微服务架构的可维护性与可扩展性，还优化了开发与部署流程，为服务组织提供了一种可扩展、高效的解决方案。

title: Governed Agentic AI for Software Platforms: A Reference Architecture for Safe Autonomy at Scale
authors: Sureshkumar Karuppuchamy
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have accelerated the emergence of agentic AI systems capable of reasoning, planning, and acting across software platforms [1], [9]. While such systems promise significant productivity and operational gains, unconstrained autonomy introduces substantial risks related to safety, reliability, security, regulatory compliance, and organizational trust-particularly in large, distributed enterprise environments [3], [11], [12]. These concerns are further amplified by emerging regulatory frameworks such as the European Union's Digital Services Act [5], which impose stricter requirements on transparency, accountability, and human oversight. This paper introduces a governance control plane for agentic AI systems in software platforms and empirically characterizes the trade-offs between autonomy, safety enforcement, and human oversight. The proposed architecture balances autonomous decision-making with deterministic policy enforcement and structured human control. The proposed architecture decomposes agent behavior into four controlled layers: (1) intent interpretation using LLMs [1], (2) policy-aware planning and decision logic informed by enterprise rules and risk constraints [6]–[8], (3) guarded execution over platform APIs inspired by tool-augmented LLM paradigms [9], [10], and (4) continuous telemetry, auditing, and rollback mechanisms to ensure operational safety and accountability. Central to the architecture is the concept of bounded autonomy, where agents automate routine and low-risk decisions while remaining constrained by declarative policies, approval gates, runtime validation, and execution allow-lists. We demonstrate the applicability of this approach through representative enterprise scenarios, including AI-assisted feature rollout and automated issue triage, building on established software engineering and DevOps principles [2], [4]. Beyond qualitative analysis, we report prototype-based measurements of governance overhead and safety effectiveness, including policy-evaluation latency, invalid-action blocking rates, and changes in human intervention volume across autonomy tiers. We further discuss adversarial robustness considerations such as indirect prompt injection [11], [12], concurrency and state-drift management in long-running agents, and policy conflict resolution in multi-agent settings [13]. Overall, this work contributes a practical, governance-centered blueprint for deploying agentic AI systems with explicitly bounded autonomy, observable decision-making, and enforceable safety controls in large-scale software platforms.
title_zh: 面向软件平台的受控代理型人工智能：实现大规模安全自主的参考架构
abstract_zh:
近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）的快速发展推动了能够跨软件平台进行推理、规划与行动的智能体式人工智能系统（agentic AI systems）的兴起[1]，[9]。尽管这类系统有望显著提升生产力和运营效率，但缺乏约束的自主性也带来了重大的安全、可靠性、安全性、合规性以及组织信任风险——尤其是在大规模、分布式的企业环境中[3]，[11]，[12]。这些担忧在欧盟《数字服务法》（Digital Services Act）等新兴监管框架的背景下进一步加剧[5]，该法规对透明度、责任归属和人工监督提出了更严格的要求。

本文提出了一种面向软件平台中智能体式AI系统的治理控制平面（governance control plane），并基于实证研究刻画了自主性、安全管控与人工监督之间的权衡关系。所提出的架构在自主决策与确定性策略执行、结构化人工控制之间实现平衡。该架构将智能体行为分解为四个受控层级：（1）利用大语言模型进行意图解析[1]；（2）基于企业规则与风险约束的、具备策略感知能力的规划与决策逻辑[6]–[8]；（3）受保护的平台API执行机制，借鉴工具增强型大语言模型范式[9]，[10]；（4）持续的遥测监控、审计追踪及回滚机制，以保障操作安全与可问责性。

该架构的核心理念是“有限自主性”（bounded autonomy）：即智能体仅自动化处理常规且低风险的决策，同时始终受到声明式策略、审批关卡、运行时验证以及执行白名单的约束。我们通过典型的 enterprise 场景展示了该方法的适用性，包括AI辅助的功能发布与自动问题分类，其设计建立在成熟的软件工程与DevOps原则基础之上[2]，[4]。

除了定性分析外，本文还报告了基于原型系统的量化测量结果，涵盖治理开销与安全有效性指标，如策略评估延迟、无效操作拦截率，以及不同自主级别下人工干预量的变化。此外，文章还深入探讨了对抗鲁棒性相关挑战，例如间接提示注入攻击[11]，[12]，长期运行智能体中的并发控制与状态漂移管理，以及多智能体环境下策略冲突的解决机制[13]。

总体而言，本工作提供了一个实用、以治理为中心的蓝图，旨在支持在大规模软件平台中部署具有明确边界自主性的智能体式AI系统，确保其决策过程可观测、可解释，并具备可强制执行的安全控制措施。

title: KubeNetLLM: An Architectural Framework for Context-Aware Kubernetes Network Configuration Using LLMS and MCP
authors: Sonika Arora, Prashanth Josyula, Ankit Rajput
abstract: As organizations scale their containerized infrastructures, managing Kubernetes network configurations has become increasingly complex, with configuration-related issues accounting for 67% of production outages. This paper introduces KubeNetLLM, a comprehensive architectural framework that automates Kubernetes network configuration generation by leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) enhanced with the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Our approach features a sophisticated four-component architecture with hierarchical validation, successfully generating deployable configurations across our test scenarios. Through extensive experiments on real Kubernetes clusters, we demonstrate that KubeNetLLM reduces configuration time from hours to an average of 10.5 seconds while eliminating configuration errors. The framework processes natural language requirements using locally-deployed LLMs (Ollama with llama3.2:3b), consuming only 2,809 tokens across five experimental scenarios. We present a novel MCP-based architecture designed for context-aware configuration, though our current implementation uses simulated MCP responses. The framework includes comprehensive validation, security analysis, and demonstrates the feasibility of natural language-driven infrastructure automation while establishing architectural patterns for future context-aware systems.
title_zh: KubeNetLLM：一种基于大语言模型与MCP的上下文感知Kubernetes网络配置架构框架
abstract_zh: 随着组织不断扩展其容器化基础设施，Kubernetes网络配置的管理变得日益复杂，其中配置相关问题占生产环境故障的67%。本文提出KubeNetLLM，一种全面的架构框架，通过结合大型语言模型（LLMs）与模型上下文协议（MCP）来自动化生成Kubernetes网络配置。我们的方法采用先进的四组件架构，并引入分层验证机制，在所有测试场景中成功生成可部署的配置。通过对真实Kubernetes集群进行大量实验，我们证明KubeNetLLM将配置时间从数小时缩短至平均10.5秒，同时彻底消除了配置错误。该框架利用本地部署的LLM（Ollama搭配llama3.2:3b）处理自然语言需求，五个实验场景总共仅消耗2,809个token。我们提出了一种基于MCP的新型架构，专为上下文感知的配置设计，尽管当前实现使用的是模拟的MCP响应。该框架包含全面的验证机制和安全分析，展示了以自然语言驱动基础设施自动化的可行性，并为未来上下文感知系统建立了可复用的架构模式。

title: From Concept to Creation: Harnessing AI for Rapid Innovation and MVP Delivery
authors: Aparna Krishna Penumatcha
publish: 2025 IEEE Women in Engineering (WIE) Forum USA East
abstract: Light speed development and Minimum Viable Product (MVP)-driven innovation have become the focus of modern product and software engineering as organizations seek quicker time-to-market and swift market confirmation. In that regard, artificial intelligence (AI) has become one of the primary facilitators of improving concept-to-creation pipelines through the automated ideation process, requirement engineering, design, development, testing, deployment, and evaluation. The review is a synthesis of recent literature that aims to explore how AI changes the traditional innovation life-cycles to data-driven, adaptive, and continuous processes that help deliver MVP's quickly. The results show that AI can dramatically enhance the pace of development, its cost-efficiency, and its accuracy in decisions, as well as allow accelerated iteration and validation of evidence-based ones. Nonetheless, it is also stated in the review that there are persistent knowledge gaps in the area of explainability, governance, long-term quality, and human-AI collaboration in MVP scenarios. On these gaps, future research recommendations have been put across, such as the creation of integrated AI-based innovation models, standardized assessment tools, and responsible AI implementation. Holistically, the review offers a unified outlook of AI-based rapid innovation and identifies its strategic opportunities in developing sustainable MVP's.
title_zh: 从概念到创造：利用人工智能实现快速创新与最小可行产品（MVP）的交付
abstract_zh: 光速发展与最小可行产品（MVP）驱动的创新已成为现代产品与软件工程的核心，组织纷纷追求更短的上市时间及快速的市场验证。在此背景下，人工智能（AI）已成为优化从概念到创造全流程的关键推手，通过自动化创意生成、需求工程、设计、开发、测试、部署和评估等环节，显著提升效率。本文综述了近期相关文献，旨在探讨AI如何将传统的创新生命周期转变为数据驱动、动态适应且持续迭代的流程，从而加速MVP的交付。研究结果表明，AI能够大幅提升开发速度、成本效益和决策准确性，并实现证据驱动的快速迭代与验证。然而，该综述也指出，在可解释性、治理机制、长期质量以及人机协同等MVP应用场景中仍存在持续的知识空白。针对这些不足，未来研究建议包括构建集成化的AI驱动创新模型、开发标准化评估工具以及推动负责任的AI实施。总体而言，本综述为基于AI的快速创新提供了统一视角，并揭示了其在打造可持续MVP方面的战略机遇。

title: Can LLMs Find Bugs in Code? An Evaluation from Beginner Errors to Security Vulnerabilities in Python and C++
authors: Akshay Mhatre, Noujoud Nader, Patrick Diehl, Deepti Gupta
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT-4, Claude 3, and LLaMA 4 are increasingly embedded in software/application development, supporting tasks from code generation to debugging. Yet, their real-world effectiveness in detecting diverse software bugs, particularly complex, security-relevant vulnerabilities, remains underexplored. This study presents a systematic, empirical evaluation of these three leading LLMs using a benchmark of foundational programming errors, classic security flaws, and advanced, production-grade bugs in C++ and Python. The dataset integrates real code from SEED Labs, OpenSSL (via the Suresoft GLaDOS database), and PyBugHive, validated through local compilation and testing pipelines. A novel multi-stage, context-aware prompting protocol simulates realistic debugging scenarios, while a graded rubric measures detection accuracy, reasoning depth, and remediation quality. Our results show that all models excel at identifying syntactic and semantic issues in well-scoped code, making them promising for educational use and as first-pass reviewers in automated code auditing. Performance diminishes in scenarios involving complex security vulnerabilities and large-scale production code, with ChatGPT-4 and Claude 3 generally providing more nuanced contextual analyses than LLaMA 4. This highlights both the promise and the present constraints of LLMs in serving as reliable code analysis tools.
title_zh: 大型语言模型能否发现代码中的错误？对 Python 和 C++ 中从初学者错误到安全漏洞的评估
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）如ChatGPT-4、Claude 3和LLaMA 4正越来越多地被集成到软件与应用开发中，支持从代码生成到调试的各种任务。然而，它们在真实场景中检测各类软件缺陷——尤其是复杂且具有安全风险的漏洞——的实际效果仍缺乏深入研究。本研究对这三款领先的LLMs进行了系统性、实证性的评估，采用涵盖基础编程错误、经典安全漏洞以及C++和Python中的高级生产级缺陷的基准数据集。该数据集整合了来自SEED Labs、OpenSSL（通过Suresoft GLaDOS数据库）以及PyBugHive的真实代码，并通过本地编译与测试流程进行验证。研究设计了一种新颖的多阶段、上下文感知提示策略，以模拟真实的调试场景；同时采用分级评分标准，衡量模型在漏洞检测准确性、推理深度及修复质量方面的表现。

研究结果表明，所有模型在识别范围明确的代码中的语法和语义问题方面表现优异，因此在教育场景或作为自动化代码审计的初步审查工具方面具有广阔前景。然而，在涉及复杂安全漏洞和大规模生产代码的场景中，模型性能明显下降。其中，ChatGPT-4和Claude 3通常能提供比LLaMA 4更为细致的上下文分析。这一发现凸显了LLMs在作为可靠代码分析工具方面的巨大潜力，同时也揭示了当前存在的局限性。

title: Operationalizing Multi-Agent Interoperability via Contract-Driven Model Context Protocols
authors: Aswathnarayan Muthukrishnan Kirubakaran, Vinoth Punniyamoorthy, Adithya Parthasarathy, Akash Kumar Agarwal, Shiva Kumar Reddy Carimireddy, Nachiappan Chockalingam, Akshay Deshpande
abstract: Multi-agent systems powered by large language models are increasingly used to automate complex workflows involving data processing, infrastructure operations, and service orchestration. However, agent-tool interoperability in such systems is often implemented through informal schemas and prompt-embedded conventions, leading to fragile integrations, limited observability, and high recovery costs under interface evolution. This paper presents a contract-driven approach to operationalizing multi-agent interoperability using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). We propose an MCP-mediated architecture that formalizes agent-tool interactions through explicit capability descriptors, schema validation, and semantic version negotiation, while providing structured telemetry and failure isolation. The design decouples agent reasoning from tool integration, enabling independent evolution of agents and tools without breaking compatibility. We evaluate a prototype implementation using representative multi-agent automation workflows across multiple datasets with controlled schema drift. Experimental results demonstrate a <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{7. 4 \%}$</tex> improvement in integration success rate, a 60.6% reduction in mean time to recovery, and a 4.4 times increase in schema mismatch detection precision, with a P95 mediation latency overhead of 18.4 ms. These results show that contract-driven MCP mediation provides a practical and scalable foundation for building reliable, evolvable, and observable multi-agent systems in production environments.
title_zh: 通过合同驱动的模型上下文协议实现多智能体互操作性
abstract_zh: 由大型语言模型驱动的多智能体系统正被越来越多地用于自动化涉及数据处理、基础设施运维和服务编排的复杂工作流。然而，这类系统中的智能体-工具互操作性通常通过非正式的模式和嵌入提示的约定来实现，导致集成脆弱、可观测性差，并在接口演进时产生高昂的恢复成本。本文提出一种基于合约的方案，利用模型上下文协议（Model Context Protocol, MCP）来实现多智能体互操作性的工程化。我们设计了一种MCP中介架构，通过显式的能力建模描述、模式验证以及语义版本协商，正式化智能体与工具之间的交互，同时提供结构化的遥测数据和故障隔离能力。该设计将智能体推理与工具集成解耦，使得智能体和工具能够独立演进而无需破坏兼容性。我们在多个数据集上，针对典型的多智能体自动化工作流，对一个原型实现进行了评估，并引入了受控的模式漂移。实验结果表明，集成成功率提升了7.4%，平均恢复时间减少了60.6%，模式不匹配检测精度提高了4.4倍，P95中继延迟开销仅为18.4毫秒。这些结果表明，基于合约的MCP中介机制为构建可生产部署的可靠、可演化且可观测的多智能体系统提供了实用且可扩展的基础。

title: Effect of Shift-Left Security Testing on Early Vulnerability Detection in CI/CD Pipelines
authors: Yogesh S. Thanvi, Karthik Pappu, Ankit Parashar
abstract: This study synthesizes evidence from academic research, industry reports, and regulatory frameworks to evaluate the technical, operational, and organizational impacts of shiftleft adoption in cloud-native CI/CD pipelines. The results indicate that early security integration improves the mean time to detect (MTTD), reduces the severity and frequency of latestage vulnerabilities, and increases pipeline reliability by solving problems before deployment. Beyond technical results, shiftleft practices support more predictable workflows, strengthen developer engagement, and distribute security responsibilities across engineering teams. The study also identifies limitations that affect the effectiveness of shift-left, including tool noise, false positives, limited exploitability context, and the inability of static tools to detect runtime-specific vulnerabilities. Differences in automation maturity, security culture, and workflow integration further shape adoption outcomes. When supported by calibrated tooling, governance alignment, and complementary runtime defenses, shift-left practices provide a practical and scalable pathway to strengthen security posture and operational resilience in cloudnative CI/CD ecosystems.
title_zh: 左移安全测试对CI/CD流水线中早期漏洞检测的影响
abstract_zh: 本研究综合了学术研究、行业报告及监管框架的证据，评估了在云原生CI/CD流水线中采用“左移”（shift-left）安全策略在技术、运营和组织层面的影响。研究结果表明，早期集成安全措施能够缩短平均漏洞发现时间（MTTD），降低后期漏洞的严重程度与发生频率，并通过在部署前解决潜在问题来提升流水线的可靠性。除了技术层面的成效外，“左移”实践还支持更可预测的工作流程，增强开发人员的参与度，并将安全责任在工程团队间合理分担。然而，研究也识别出影响“左移”有效性的若干局限性，包括工具噪声、误报率高、缺乏实际可利用性上下文，以及静态分析工具无法检测运行时特有的漏洞等问题。自动化成熟度、安全文化差异及工作流程整合程度的不同，进一步影响了“左移”策略的实施效果。当“左移”实践得到经过校准的工具支持、治理机制对齐以及互补的运行时防护措施共同支撑时，便为强化云原生CI/CD生态系统的安全态势与运营韧性提供了一条切实可行且可扩展的路径。

title: Cybershield: Secure Boot for Obfuscated Instruction Codes
authors: Garrett R. Perkins, Tristan Running Crane, Hezekiah A. Austin, Benjamin Macht, Chris Major, Ann Marie Reinhold, Clemente Izurieta, Brock LaMeres
publish: 2025 IEEE 11th International Conference on Space Mission Challenges for Information Technology (SMC-IT)
abstract: The increasing reliance on Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) in security-critical applications underscores the need for robust protection mechanisms against cyber threats such as buffer overflow and injection attacks. This paper presents Cybershield, a novel integration of a Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) within RadPC, a radiation-tolerant softcore processor featuring Quad Modular Redundancy (QMR). Leveraging RadPC's four-core architecture, Cybershield's TEE employs secure boot from non-volatile memory to initialize RadPC's cores with obfuscated instruction codes. The opcode obfuscation and a hardware-based anti-voter mechanism prevent the execution of unauthorized code and detect Indicators of Compromise (IoCs). By implementing secure boot and opcode obfuscation, Cybershield mitigates common attack vectors while maintaining software redundancy and recoverability. Experimental validation demonstrates the system's ability to detect buffer overflow attacks and prevent unauthorized code execution. While the integration of a TEE introduces computational overhead and development constraints due to RadPC's bare-metal environment, this work lays the foundation for combining hardware and software redundancy to enhance the security of embedded systems.
title_zh: 网络盾牌：用于混淆指令代码的安全启动
abstract_zh: 在安全关键型应用中对现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的依赖日益增加，凸显了针对缓冲区溢出和注入攻击等网络威胁实施强大防护机制的必要性。本文提出Cybershield，一种将可信执行环境（TEE）集成到RadPC——一种具备四重模块冗余（QMR）的抗辐射软核处理器——中的创新方案。利用RadPC的四核架构，Cybershield的TEE通过非易失性存储器实现安全启动，以混淆的指令代码初始化RadPC的各个核心。通过操作码混淆以及基于硬件的抗投票器机制，系统能够阻止未经授权代码的执行，并检测入侵指标（IoCs）。通过实施安全启动与操作码混淆，Cybershield有效缓解了常见攻击向量，同时保持了软件冗余性和可恢复性。实验验证表明，该系统能够成功检测缓冲区溢出攻击并防止非法代码执行。尽管TEE的集成在RadPC裸机环境下带来了计算开销和开发限制，但本研究为结合硬件与软件冗余以提升嵌入式系统安全性奠定了基础。

title: EAL-ICNet: Enhanced Attention Lightweight Network With Multi-Scale Transformer Modules for IC Image Segmentation
authors: Hongnan Cheng, Chaozhi Yu, Yan Zhang, Ziwen Yuan, Chenguang Zhang
abstract: The rapid development of deep learning, especially convolutional neural networks, has greatly enhanced automated segmentation of integrated circuit (IC) images. However, current methods face challenges: 1) Large-scale industrial IC images require high-throughput models, which many high-parameter networks struggle to meet. 2) Conventional convolutions are limited in capturing global dependencies within circuit structures. 3) Optical microscopy images often contain noise and artifacts that hinder accurate segmentation. To address these issues, we propose EAL-ICNet (Enhanced Attention Lightweight IC Network), a lightweight architecture designed for IC image segmentation. EAL-ICNet integrates a Depthwise Asymmetric Bottleneck (DAB) module, combining depthwise asymmetric and dilated convolutions for improved efficiency and reduced complexity. Inspired by Transformer mechanisms, Token Statistics Self-Attention (TSSA) and Parallel Multi-Scale Attention (PMA) are introduced to capture non-local dependencies and suppress noise. EAL-ICNet also employs multi-scale contextual modeling for better feature extraction. We evaluate the model on four real IC datasets and demonstrate its ability to balance accuracy and inference speed, making it suitable for industrial applications. The code is available at <uri xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">https://github.com/chndaz/EAL-ICNet</uri>.
title_zh: EAL-ICNet：一种基于多尺度Transformer模块的增强型注意力轻量级网络用于集成电路图像分割
abstract_zh: 深度学习的迅速发展，尤其是卷积神经网络的进步，极大地提升了集成电路（IC）图像的自动化分割能力。然而，当前方法仍面临诸多挑战：1）大规模工业级IC图像需要高吞吐量模型，而许多高参数量网络难以满足这一需求；2）传统卷积在捕捉电路结构中的全局依赖关系方面存在局限性；3）光学显微镜图像常包含噪声和伪影，影响分割的准确性。为解决上述问题，我们提出EAL-ICNet（增强注意力轻量化IC网络），一种专为IC图像分割设计的轻量化架构。EAL-ICNet融合了深度可分离异构瓶颈（DAB）模块，结合深度可分离异构卷积与空洞卷积，以提升效率并降低模型复杂度。受Transformer机制启发，我们引入了Token统计自注意力（TSSA）和并行多尺度注意力（PMA）模块，以捕捉非局部依赖关系并有效抑制噪声。此外，EAL-ICNet还采用多尺度上下文建模策略，实现更优的特征提取。我们在四个真实IC数据集上对模型进行了评估，结果表明其在精度与推理速度之间实现了良好平衡，适用于工业应用场景。代码已开源，可通过以下链接获取：https://github.com/chndaz/EAL-ICNet

title: Secure and Offline-Capable Enterprise CRM Using On-Device Large Language Models
authors: Vijaya Sai Munduru
abstract: Recent trends in moving CRM systems into cloud-based infrastructures create serious bottlenecks concerning latency, data privacy, and offline access of field professionals. We present an architectural framework that describes on-device deployment of quantized LLMs for seamless, offline-capable CRM. A compressed model version of LLaMA-2-7B was fine-tuned using QLoRA techniques on 427 unique enterprise sales interaction logs. 1 For model deployment, PyTorch Mobile was used, optimized inference utilizes ONNX Runtime, and model orchestration is done through LangChain. Our results show that 4-bit quantization combined with hardware-aware pruning can execute these models locally on-device, executing intent recognition at 94% of full-precision cloud models while reducing the inference latency by 60% and removing data egress vulnerabilities. This work confirms the possibility of executing complex CRM tasks like meeting summarization, sentiment analysis, and automatic entry generation on locally run standard enterprise-grade tablets and smartphones. It sets a new bar for secure, resilient enterprise mobile computing and will ensure productivity on the go, independent of network conditions.
title_zh: 基于设备端大型语言模型的 secure 且离线可用的企业级CRM
abstract_zh: 将客户关系管理（CRM）系统迁移至基于云的基础设施的近期趋势，带来了延迟、数据隐私以及现场专业人员离线访问等方面的严重瓶颈。本文提出了一种架构框架，描述了在设备端部署量化大语言模型（LLM），以实现无缝且具备离线功能的CRM应用。我们使用QLoRA技术，在427条独特的企业销售互动日志上对LLaMA-2-7B的压缩版本进行了微调。在模型部署方面，采用PyTorch Mobile；推理优化则利用ONNX Runtime；模型编排通过LangChain完成。实验结果表明，4比特量化结合硬件感知剪枝技术，可在本地设备上运行这些模型，实现意图识别性能达到全精度云端模型的94%，同时将推理延迟降低60%，并彻底消除数据外泄风险。本研究证实了在标准的企业级平板电脑和智能手机上本地运行复杂CRM任务（如会议摘要生成、情感分析、自动记录创建）的可行性。这为安全、可靠的企事业移动计算树立了新标准，确保用户在任何网络条件下都能保持高效生产力。

title: Secure by Design: Quantifying Architectural Resilience and the Agents Rule of two
authors: Qianlong Lan, Anuj Kaul, Shaun Jones, Stephanie Westrum
abstract: The transition of Large Language Models (LLMs) into autonomous agents equipped with tools necessitates a security paradigm shift. Current defenses typically rely on prompt engineering, which has proven insufficient to defend against Indirect Prompt Injection (IPI). This paper presents a quantitative evaluation of architectural defense patterns specifically Plan-then-Execute (P-t-E) and Context-Minimization (Context-Min), which are integrated under the strategic guidance of the Agents Rule of Two (R2). Advanced attack vectors on four distinct agent architectures, including IPI parameter hijacking and Attractive Metadata Attacks (AMA) were conducted. Our findings challenge the “Defense Tax” assumption while highlighting the limitations of a single defense mechanism. The baseline System Under Test (SUT) A proved highly vulnerable, 65% Attack Success Rate (ASR) to IPI, 100% to AMA and inefficient (3.02s latency). SUT B reduced the IPI success rate to 25% and latency to 0.50s, a 6x speed improvement. SUT C offered the highest security (21.2% ASR) but doubled the latency (1.02s) compared to SUT B. The results show that P-tE is the essential baseline for achieving efficiency and partial security and demonstrate that a layered “defense-in-depth” approach is required to fully mitigate parameter-level attacks.
title_zh: 设计即安全：量化架构韧性与代理人法则二
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）向具备工具能力的自主代理转变，要求安全范式发生根本性变革。当前的防御措施通常依赖提示工程（prompt engineering），但已被证明无法有效抵御间接提示注入（Indirect Prompt Injection, IPI）攻击。本文对两种特定的架构防御模式——“先规划后执行”（Plan-then-Execute, P-t-E）和“上下文最小化”（Context-Minimization, Context-Min）进行了量化评估，这两者均在“代理双规则”（Agents Rule of Two, R2）的战略指导下进行整合。我们针对四种不同的代理架构实施了多种先进攻击向量，包括IPI参数劫持和吸引性元数据攻击（Attractive Metadata Attacks, AMA）。研究结果挑战了“防御成本”（Defense Tax）的假设，同时揭示了单一防御机制的局限性。

基准测试系统（System Under Test, SUT）A表现出高度脆弱性：对IPI攻击的成功率达65%，对AMA攻击的成功率高达100%，且效率低下（延迟3.02秒）。SUT B将IPI攻击成功率降低至25%，延迟缩短至0.50秒，速度提升达6倍。SUT C提供了最高的安全性（ASR为21.2%），但其延迟相比SUT B翻倍至1.02秒。实验结果表明，“先规划后执行”（P-tE）是实现高效与部分安全性的必要基础，并进一步证明，要全面应对参数级别攻击，必须采用分层的“纵深防御”（defense-in-depth）策略。

title: From Bits to Trust: AI-Driven Reconfigurable Security
authors: Rye Stahle-Smith, Rasha Karakchi
abstract: Reconfigurable computing platforms such as FieldProgrammable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) are widely deployed in embedded systems and AI acceleration workloads. Their reconfigurability, however, also introduces security risks when hardware behavior is defined by externally supplied configuration bitstreams. Maliciously crafted bitstreams can embed hardware Trojans capable of leaking data, degrading system reliability, or altering computation. This paper presents BLADEI (Bitstream-Level Anomaly Detection for Embedded Inference), an AI-based predictive modeling framework for detecting malicious FPGA configurations directly from binary bitstreams. A 278-dimensional feature vector combining byte-frequency histograms, statistical summaries, and structural indicators is extracted from each bitstream and classified using supervised machine learning models. The proposed approach is evaluated on an expanded dataset of 1,090 bitstreams spanning thirteen design families re-engineered for the Xilinx PYNQ-Z1 platform, augmented through Vivado place and route directives to improve dataset diversity. Experimental results demonstrate that a Random Forest classifier achieves a macro F1-score of 0.91 on held-out test data while remaining feasible for on-device deployment, validating the effectiveness of AI-driven bitstream screening in resource-constrained environments.
title_zh: 从比特到信任：人工智能驱动的可重构安全
abstract_zh: 可重构计算平台（如现场可编程门阵列，FPGA）在嵌入式系统和人工智能加速任务中得到了广泛应用。然而，其可重构特性也带来了安全风险，因为硬件行为由外部提供的配置比特流决定。恶意构造的比特流可能嵌入硬件木马，导致数据泄露、系统可靠性下降或计算结果被篡改。本文提出BLADEI（Bitstream-Level Anomaly Detection for Embedded Inference），一种基于人工智能的预测建模框架，能够直接从二进制比特流中检测恶意FPGA配置。该方法从每个比特流中提取一个包含278维特征的向量，融合了字节频率直方图、统计摘要和结构特征指标，并采用监督式机器学习模型进行分类。所提方法在扩展的数据集上进行了评估，该数据集包含1,090个比特流，覆盖十三类设计家族，均针对Xilinx PYNQ-Z1平台重新设计，并通过Vivado布局布线指令进行扩充以增强数据集多样性。实验结果表明，随机森林分类器在保留测试数据上的宏平均F1分数达到0.91，同时具备在设备端部署的可行性，验证了AI驱动的比特流筛查在资源受限环境中的有效性。

title: Research on Vulnerability Mining Technology of a Private Instant Messaging Protocol Based on Reverse Engineering and State Awareness
authors: Yu Shi, Chengyu Du, Man Chen, Qingbing Ji
publish: 2025 2nd World Conference on Computer and Information Security (WCCIS)
abstract: The security of instant messaging protocols directly impacts user privacy and security, and the privatization of protocols renders traditional vulnerability analysis methods ineffective in comprehensively assessing the security of instant messaging protocols. This paper proposes a vulnerability mining method for proprietary instant messaging protocols based on reverse engineering and state awareness. Starting from the reverse engineering of instant messaging software entities, the method combines traffic data to construct a protocol state machine model for instant messaging. Through active state machine learning algorithms, it gradually infers the protocol's temporal logic and state transition rules, thereby obtaining the protocol state machine model for instant messaging. By performing a deep traversal of the protocol state machine, anomalous injection tests are constructed, response data and response states are analyzed and compared, and vulnerabilities in private instant messaging protocols are identified.
title_zh: 基于逆向工程与状态感知的私有即时通讯协议漏洞挖掘技术研究
abstract_zh: 即时通讯协议的安全性直接关系到用户的隐私与安全，而协议的私有化使得传统的漏洞分析方法难以全面评估即时通讯协议的安全性。本文提出一种基于逆向工程与状态感知的专有即时通讯协议漏洞挖掘方法。该方法从即时通讯软件实体的逆向工程入手，结合流量数据构建即时通讯协议的状态机模型。通过主动式状态机学习算法，逐步推断出协议的时间逻辑与状态转换规则，从而获得即时通讯协议的状态机模型。在此基础上，对协议状态机进行深度遍历，构造异常注入测试，分析并比对响应数据与响应状态，进而识别出私有即时通讯协议中的安全漏洞。

title: Research on the Fusion of Knowledge Graph and Large Language Model Based on Few-Shot Learning
authors: Zhengzheng Wei
publish: 2026 5th International Symposium on Computer Applications and Information Technology (ISCAIT)
abstract: This paper focuses on the research of fusion mechanism between knowledge graph and large language model in few-shot scenarios. Aiming at the bottleneck of knowledge graph construction caused by scarce labeled data in professional fields, as well as the problems of knowledge hallucination and weak interpretability of reasoning in large language models, this paper defines the mathematical expression and constraints of fewshot scenarios, sorts out its core construction technologies, proposes a “three-layer dual-cycle” fusion architecture and knowledge interaction mechanism, and establishes a knowledge hallucination quantitative evaluation system and ISKG mitigation mechanism. Experiments show that the ISKG algorithm achieves an average accuracy of 75.12% on the FEW-NERD-INTER dataset, which is higher than that of existing systems. The deep fusion of the two forms a complementary closed loop, providing a feasible solution for intelligent applications in low-resource fields and offering references for related research.
title_zh: 基于少样本学习的知识图谱与大语言模型融合研究
abstract_zh: 本文聚焦于知识图谱与大语言模型在少样本场景下的融合机制研究。针对专业领域中因标注数据稀缺导致的知识图谱构建瓶颈，以及大语言模型存在的知识幻觉和推理可解释性弱等问题，本文定义了少样本场景的数学表达与约束条件，梳理其核心构建技术，提出“三层双循环”融合架构与知识交互机制，并建立知识幻觉的量化评估体系及ISKG缓解机制。实验结果表明，所提出的ISKG算法在FEW-NERD-INTER数据集上平均准确率达到75.12%，优于现有系统。两种技术的深度融合形成了互补的闭环，为低资源领域的智能应用提供了可行解决方案，并为相关研究提供了有益参考。

title: Hybrid LLM Architectures for On-Device and Cloud-Based Intelligence in Regulated Industries
authors: Sivarama Krishna Akhil Koduri
abstract: The deployment of Large Language Models (LLMs) in regulated sectors such as healthcare, finance, and legal services is currently hindered by a rigid dichotomy: the privacy risks of centralized cloud APIs (e.g., Azure OpenAI, AWS Bedrock) versus the computational limitations of local devices. This paper proposes a Hybrid LLM Architecture that bridges this gap by utilizing commoditized on-device runtimes like Ollama on consumer silicon (Apple M-Series, NVIDIA GeForce) as a “sovereign gatekeeper” for hyperscale cloud intelligence. We analyze the hardware physics of Unified Memory Architectures (UMA) versus discrete GPU VRAM, formally define privacy leakage using Fisher Information Loss (FIL), and present a mathematical framework for dynamic workload offloading. Benchmarks suggest that local Llama 3 70B models may exhibit hallucination rates competitive with GPT-4 (e.g., 4.1 % vs. 9.6 % in specific tasks), supporting the potential of “sovereign reasoning” for sensitive data processing.
title_zh: 受监管行业中的设备端与云端智能混合大模型架构
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）在医疗、金融和法律服务等受监管领域中的部署，目前受到一种僵化二元对立的制约：一方面是在中心化云API（如Azure OpenAI、AWS Bedrock）中使用所面临的隐私风险，另一方面则是本地设备计算能力的局限性。本文提出了一种混合式LLM架构，通过利用消费级芯片（如Apple M系列、NVIDIA GeForce）上的通用本地运行时（如Ollama），将本地设备作为“主权守门人”，以实现对超大规模云智能的安全访问。我们分析了统一内存架构（UMA）与独立GPU显存之间的硬件物理特性差异，基于费雪信息损失（Fisher Information Loss, FIL）形式化定义了隐私泄露，并构建了一个动态工作负载卸载的数学框架。基准测试表明，本地部署的Llama 3 70B模型在特定任务中的幻觉率可达到与GPT-4相当的水平（例如，4.1% vs. 9.6%），这为敏感数据处理中的“主权推理”提供了可行性支持。

title: AI-Augmented Technical Debt Management in Legacy Software Systems
authors: Sapan Pandya
abstract: Legacy software systems continue to support mission-critical enterprise operations, even as technical debt accumulates over time. As systems evolve, this debt often manifests as rising code complexity, architectural drift, and gaps in documentation that slow down change. In this work, an AI-augmented toolkit is introduced that embeds machine-learning analysis and large-language-model summarization directly into CI workflows. The solution combines three components: an AI-enhanced static analysis trigger, an intelligent debt tagging matrix, and an AI-assisted refactor log sheet. To assess its effectiveness, the toolkit was applied in a six-month pilot using anonymized software systems representative of enterprise environments and was evaluated against a static-analysis-only baseline. Across the pilot period, error rates per release were reduced by 60%, while the maintainability index improved by 18% and review-cycle time decreased by 18%. These results suggest that integrating AI-assisted technical-debt governance into CI pipelines can improve maintenance outcomes in long lived systems without forcing disruptive rewrites.
title_zh: AI增强的遗留软件系统技术债管理
abstract_zh: 遗留的软件系统持续支撑着关键的企业运营，即使随着时间推移技术债务不断累积。随着系统不断演进，这些债务往往表现为代码复杂度上升、架构偏离以及文档缺失等问题，从而拖慢了变更速度。本文提出了一种由人工智能增强的工具套件，将机器学习分析与大语言模型摘要功能直接嵌入到持续集成（CI）工作流中。该解决方案包含三个核心组件：AI增强的静态分析触发器、智能技术债务标记矩阵，以及AI辅助的重构日志表。为评估其有效性，该工具套件在为期六个月的试点项目中被应用于代表企业环境的匿名化软件系统，并与仅使用静态分析的基准方案进行对比。在整个试点期间，每次发布中的错误率降低了60%，可维护性指数提升了18%，评审周期时间缩短了18%。这些结果表明，将AI辅助的技术债务治理集成到CI流水线中，能够在不强制进行颠覆性重写的情况下，显著改善长期运行系统的维护效果。

title: CircuChain: Disentangling Competence and Compliance in LLM Circuit Analysis
authors: Mayank Ravishankara
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) advance toward expert-level performance in engineering domains, reliable reasoning under user-specified constraints becomes critical. In circuit analysis, for example, a numerically correct solution is insufficient if it violates established methodological conventions such as mesh directionality or polarity assignments—errors that can propagate in safety-critical systems. Yet it remains unclear whether frontier models truly apply first-principles reasoning or rely on entrenched training priors that conflict with explicit instructions. We introduce CircuChain, a diagnostic benchmark designed to disentangle instruction compliance from physical reasoning competence in electrical circuit analysis. CircuChain consists of counterbalanced Control/Trap problem pairs across five canonical circuit topologies, augmented with systematic variations in sign conventions, current orientations, and polarity definitions. A multi-stage verification pipeline—combining symbolic solvers, SPICE simulation, and an LLM-based error taxonomy—enables fine-grained attribution of failures to convention errors, physics errors, arithmetic mistakes, or hallucinations. Across 100 tasks per model, we observe a consistent Com-pliance-Competence Divergence. The strongest model evaluated exhibits near-perfect physical reasoning but a high rate of convention violations when Trap conditions deliberately invert natural sign patterns. Conversely, weaker models display lower physical fidelity yet superior adherence to explicit instructions. These results suggest that increased model capability does not guarantee improved constraint alignment and highlight the need for new evaluation frameworks that stress instruction-following under mathematically rigid domains. CircuChain provides one such framework and offers actionable insights for both engineering education and AI alignment research.
title_zh: CircuChain：在大语言模型电路分析中解耦能力与合规性
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）在工程领域逐步达到专家级表现，用户指定约束下的可靠推理变得至关重要。以电路分析为例，即使解法在数值上正确，若违背了既定的方法论规范（如网孔方向性或极性设定），仍可能导致严重错误——这类错误在安全关键系统中可能产生连锁反应。然而，目前尚不清楚前沿模型是否真正具备基于基本原理的推理能力，还是仅仅依赖于训练数据中根深蒂固的先验知识，从而与明确指令相冲突。为此，我们提出了CircuChain，一个诊断性基准测试，旨在分离电气电路分析中的指令遵从性与物理推理能力。CircuChain包含五种典型电路拓扑结构，每种均设计有平衡的对照组（Control）与陷阱问题（Trap）配对，并通过系统性地改变符号约定、电流方向和极性定义来增强复杂度。我们采用多阶段验证流程——结合符号求解器、SPICE仿真以及基于大语言模型的错误分类体系——实现对失败原因的细粒度归因：可精确区分是违反规范、物理错误、算术失误，还是幻觉所致。在每模型100项任务的评估中，我们观察到一种持续存在的“遵从性-能力分化”现象：最强模型展现出近乎完美的物理推理能力，但在故意反转自然符号模式的“陷阱”条件下，却表现出较高的规范违反率；而较弱模型虽物理准确性较低，却对显式指令表现出更强的遵从性。这些结果表明，模型能力的提升并不等同于约束对齐性的改善，凸显了在数学严格性高的领域中建立新型评估框架的迫切需求。CircuChain正是这样一种框架，为工程教育与人工智能对齐研究提供了可操作的洞见。

title: GenAITD Score: A Quantitative Framework for Measuring Enterprise Technical Debt and Generative AI Readiness
authors: Pankaj Kumar Jain, Jahnavi Thirumalasetty
abstract: The rapid adoption of Generative Artificial Intelligence (Gen-AI) in enterprise environments has outpaced the readiness of existing technical and governance infrastructures, exposing latent forms of technical debt across data pipelines, legacy workflows, and machine learning operations (MLOps) practices. While organizations are under increasing pressure to operationalize Gen-AI capabilities, existing maturity models lack the granularity required to identify the specific architectural and operational constraints that hinder reliable deployment. This paper introduces the Gen-AI Technical Debt (GenAITD) Score, a quantitative framework designed to measure enterprise readiness and Gen-AI-specific technical debt. The framework constructs a composite index on a normalized <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$0-500$</tex> scale and evaluates enterprise readiness across five weighted dimensions: Data Debt & Governance, Process & Automation, AI Platform Architecture, Organizational Readiness, and Risk & Compliance. A total of 45 objectively defined Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) are aggregated to produce both a numerical score and a corresponding letter-grade classification (A+ to D), enabling a standardized, audit-able mechanism for stakeholders to benchmark maturity.
title_zh: GenAITD评分：一种量化衡量企业技术债务与生成式人工智能就绪程度的框架
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能（Gen-AI）在企业环境中的快速应用，已超越了现有技术与治理基础设施的准备程度，暴露出数据管道、传统工作流程以及机器学习运维（MLOps）实践中的潜在技术债务。尽管组织面临日益增长的压力，亟需将Gen-AI能力投入实际运营，但现有的成熟度模型缺乏足够的细致度，难以识别阻碍可靠部署的具体架构与操作瓶颈。本文提出“生成式人工智能技术债务”（Gen-AI Technical Debt, GenAITD）评分体系，这是一种量化的评估框架，旨在衡量企业的准备程度及Gen-AI相关的特定技术债务。该框架构建了一个标准化的0–500分复合指数，并从五个加权维度评估企业成熟度：数据债务与治理、流程与自动化、AI平台架构、组织准备度以及风险与合规性。通过整合45个客观定义的关键绩效指标（KPI），该框架不仅生成一个数值评分，还对应给出字母等级分类（A+至D），为利益相关方提供一种标准化、可审计的机制，用于衡量和对标企业成熟度水平。

title: SecureLogX: A Java–Native, AI–Augmented Logging Framework for Privacy–Preserving, Parallel Log Processing in Enterprise Systems
authors: Syed Danish Ali
abstract: Enterprise logging systems must meet increasing demands for real-time privacy compliance under regulations such as HIPAA and GDPR while sustaining high throughput. This paper presents SecureLogX, an AI-powered Java logging framework for inline, privacy-preserving observability. SecureLogX integrates ONNX-based transformer inference with parallel and asynchronous log processing to enable adaptive masking of sensitive entities across JSON, XML, and text logs. The hybrid NER engine dynamically identifies personal identifiers without reliance on static regex rules. Experimental evaluation demonstrates low-latency performance suitable for distributed microservice environments.
title_zh: SecureLogX：一种基于Java-原生、AI增强的日志框架，支持企业系统中隐私保护的并行日志处理
abstract_zh: 企业日志系统必须在满足HIPAA和GDPR等法规对实时隐私合规性日益增长的需求的同时，保持高吞吐量。本文提出SecureLogX，一种基于人工智能的Java日志框架，实现内联、隐私保护的可观测性。SecureLogX结合基于ONNX的Transformer推理与并行异步日志处理，能够在JSON、XML及文本日志中自适应地屏蔽敏感实体。其混合命名实体识别（NER）引擎无需依赖静态正则表达式规则，即可动态识别个人身份标识信息。实验评估表明，该系统具备低延迟性能，适用于分布式微服务环境。

title: BinEnhance-Pro: Enhancing Binary Code Search by Distinguishing Similar but Non-Homologous Functions
authors: Yongpan Wang, Qi Liu, Zhen Lei, Siyuan Li, Xiaojie Zhu, Zhihui Zhao, Xiaodong Gu, Yongle Chen
publish: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing
abstract: Binary code search is essential in applications such as software reuse detection and vulnerability identification. Existing methods rely on intra-function semantics or their combination with call graphs, which struggle to address real-world complexities like function inlining (missing callees) and highly similar calls. Our previous work However, its effectiveness is limited by low-quality random training data, which fails to adequately distinguish Similar but Non-homologous Functions (SNFs), resulting in a high false positive rate. In this paper, we propose <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">BinEnhance-Pro</small>, a general framework that integrates a hard negative mining strategy into the training process. Specifically, we select SNFs with high similarity in internal embeddings as hard negatives, and introduce an adaptive balancing mechanism that determines their optimal ratio to random samples based on the learning capability of the internal semantic model. This strategy forces the model to learn finer-grained decision boundaries, effectively distinguishing true semantic equivalence from superficial structural similarity. We conduct experiments across six different tasks, and the results demonstrate both the performance and robustness of <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">BinEnhance-Pro</small> . When applied to existing methods such as Diemph, HermesSim on a public dataset, <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">BinEnhance-Pro</small> demonstrates a notable improvement in Mean Average Precision (MAP), increasing from 54.2% to 70.3%, and outperforming the enhancements brought by <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">BinEnhance</small>
title_zh: BinEnhance-Pro：通过区分相似但非同源函数来增强二进制代码搜索
abstract_zh: 二进制代码搜索在软件复用检测和漏洞识别等应用中至关重要。现有方法主要依赖函数内部语义信息或其与调用图的结合，但在应对真实世界中的复杂情况（如函数内联导致的被调用函数缺失、高度相似的调用）时表现不佳。我们之前的工作虽然取得了一定进展，但其效果受限于低质量的随机训练数据，难以有效区分“相似但非同源函数”（SNFs），导致误报率较高。本文提出一种通用框架——<sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">BinEnhance-Pro</small>，该框架在训练过程中引入了硬负样本挖掘策略。具体而言，我们选取在内部嵌入表示上具有高相似性的SNFs作为硬负样本，并设计了一种自适应平衡机制，根据内部语义模型的学习能力动态确定其与随机样本的最佳比例。这一策略促使模型学习更精细的决策边界，从而有效区分真正的语义等价性与表面的结构相似性。我们在六个不同任务上进行了实验，结果表明<sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">BinEnhance-Pro</small>具备优异的性能与鲁棒性。当应用于Diemph、HermesSim等现有方法在公开数据集上的任务时，<sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">BinEnhance-Pro</small>显著提升了平均精度均值（MAP），从54.2%提升至70.3%，优于<sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">BinEnhance</small>所带来的改进。

title: Preserving Runtime Control Flow Integrity Transparently Through Hardware-based Stack Confidentiality and Integrity on RISC-V IoT Devices
authors: Weike Wang, Bingzheng Li, Xiaolei Wang, Rikang Zhao, Senyang Li, Xiang Wang, Juin Jei Liou
abstract: RISC-V devices are widely used in diverse IoT applications, where security is critical. Control flow hijacking attacks can circumvent existing security mechanisms to transfer the program control flow to harmful gadget chains arranged by adversaries, which are primarily initiated by tampering with the data frame and return address within the stack. In this work, we present a microarchitecture-level, hardware-assisted, lightweight scheme for encrypting and verifying stack integrity, thereby transparently enforcing runtime control-flow integrity. The encrypted stack hinders attackers’ analysis and increases the difficulty of assembling malicious gadgets. Stack integrity verification enables the system to detect malicious actions that tamper with return addresses and crucial registers at runtime. We implement the system on an Xilinx XC7K325T FPGA with the T-head Xuantie E906 RISC-V core. The experimental results show that, with a 16KB D-Cache across the ten selected benchmark sets, this work incurs an average performance overhead of 4.89%. At the same time, the CoreMark score decreases by merely 0.10%. The area introduced by the proposed hardware is 10.01% of the total SoC under SAED 32nm Technology.
title_zh: 通过基于硬件的RISC-V物联网设备栈机密性与完整性实现运行时控制流完整性的透明保护
abstract_zh: RISC-V设备广泛应用于各类物联网应用中，而安全性在此类场景下至关重要。控制流劫持攻击能够绕过现有的安全机制，将程序控制流引导至攻击者精心构造的恶意指令片段链，此类攻击主要通过篡改栈中的数据帧和返回地址来实现。本文提出了一种基于微架构层级、硬件辅助且轻量化的方案，用于加密与验证栈的完整性，从而透明地强制执行运行时控制流完整性。该加密栈机制有效阻碍了攻击者的分析工作，并显著增加了其构建恶意指令片段的难度。栈完整性验证功能可在运行时检测对返回地址及关键寄存器的非法篡改行为。我们在Xilinx XC7K325T FPGA上实现了该系统，并采用T-head Xuantie E906 RISC-V核心进行测试。实验结果表明，在十个选定基准测试集上，配备16KB数据缓存的情况下，本方案平均性能开销仅为4.89%；同时，CoreMark得分仅下降0.10%。在SAED 32nm工艺下，所提出的硬件模块占整个SoC面积的10.01%。

title: Enhancing Software Quality Engineering in Enterprise Systems Using Predictive and Generative AI
authors: Srikanth Singireddy, Abinaya Mettupatti Sivagnanam, Gayathri Surianarayanan
abstract: Software quality engineering is considered as a ma jor challenge for emergent enterprise systems, which is attributed to the complexity of systems and the demand for fast releases driven by dynamic distributed architecture scaling. Conventional quality assurance techniques are heavily dependent on static rulebased testing and human work in a way that is unsuitable for the changes in software behaviors and defects. Recent developments in artificial intelligence provide new ways to improve software quality processes with data-based insights and smart automation. We propose an enterprise-centric, software quality engineering improvement framework built on top of predictive analytics and generative artificial intelligence methods. This strategy uses predictive models to pinpoint at risk components and defective regions early in the design lifecycle, while generative AIs are used to automate testing case creation and validation processes. By integrating these functions into CI/CD pipeline the framework enables scalable, adaptive quality engineering for large enterprise systems. They experimentally evaluate the detection accuracy of defective code, improvement in test coverage, and efficiency of the validation by using enterprise application datasets and realworld testing situations. We show that the proposed framework increases defect prediction accuracy, automated test coverage and decreases regression testing effort as compared to traditional quality engineering methodologies. Furthermore, responsible AI concerns regarding validation checks and hallucination alleviation are taken into account to ensure dependable deployment in enterprise scenario. The results demonstrate the potential of predictive and generative AI to improve quality engineering outcomes, in large enterprise systems, with reliability, scalability, and governance removed/rewrite.
title_zh: 使用预测与生成式人工智能提升企业系统中的软件质量工程
abstract_zh: 软件质量工程被视为新兴企业系统面临的一项重大挑战，这主要归因于系统本身的复杂性以及由动态分布式架构扩展所驱动的快速发布需求。传统的质量保证技术严重依赖静态规则测试和人工操作，难以适应软件行为变化和缺陷模式的快速演进。近年来，人工智能的发展为提升软件质量流程提供了新途径，通过数据驱动的洞察力和智能自动化实现改进。本文提出一种以企业为中心的软件质量工程优化框架，该框架基于预测分析与生成式人工智能方法构建。该策略利用预测模型在设计生命周期早期识别高风险组件和缺陷区域，同时运用生成式AI自动完成测试用例的创建与验证过程。通过将这些功能集成到CI/CD流水线中，该框架实现了面向大型企业系统的可扩展、自适应质量工程。我们基于企业级应用数据集和真实测试场景，对缺陷代码检测准确率、测试覆盖率提升以及验证效率等方面进行了实验评估。结果表明，相较于传统质量工程方法，所提出的框架显著提高了缺陷预测准确率，增强了自动化测试覆盖率，并有效降低了回归测试的工作量。此外，框架还充分考虑了负责任AI的相关问题，如验证检查机制与幻觉现象缓解，以确保在企业环境中的可靠部署。研究结果证明，预测性与生成式人工智能在大型企业系统中具有显著潜力，能够实现兼具可靠性、可扩展性与治理能力的软件质量工程优化。

title: Improved Prompt Generation Framework Using Gemma-3-Based Context-Aware Language Models
authors: Komal Paul, Ariyan Basu, Tamal Ghosh, Sajal Saha
publish: 2026 International Conference on Signal Analysis for Smart Systems (SIGNASS)
abstract: Language models are powerful tools for generating text, yet they often falter when faced with vague or unstructured prompts common in real-world use. This paper proposes an automated framework to transform such messy inputs into clear, structured prompts through a systematic decomposition process based on elements such as what, how, when, and where. A compact model, Gemma-3 4B, trained on test datasets, performs this reframing and outputs results in JSON format. Comparative analysis with Llama 3.2, Phi 2, and Queen 2.5 demonstrates its superior ability to enhance response accuracy and contextual relevance in domain-specific applications. The model's modular, scalable architecture also supports adaptation across domains such as healthcare, education, and manufacturing. Overall, this approach advances the usability of language models by teaching them to interpret human intent more effectively.
title_zh: 基于Gemma-3的上下文感知语言模型的改进提示生成框架
abstract_zh: 语言模型是生成文本的强大工具，但在面对现实应用中常见的模糊或无结构提示时，往往表现不佳。本文提出了一种自动化框架，通过基于“何事、如何、何时、何地”等要素的系统性分解过程，将杂乱的输入转化为清晰、结构化的提示。一个经过测试数据集训练的轻量级模型——Gemma-3 4B，负责执行这一重构任务，并以JSON格式输出结果。与Llama 3.2、Phi 2和Queen 2.5的对比分析表明，该模型在特定领域应用中显著提升了响应的准确性和上下文相关性。此外，该模型模块化且可扩展的架构使其能够灵活适应医疗、教育、制造等多个领域。总体而言，这一方法通过提升语言模型对人类意图的理解能力，显著增强了其实际可用性。

title: PYXIS: A Highly Predictable Toolchain for FPGA Circuit Production of Advanced GNC Algorithm
authors: Inès Winandy, Arnaud Dion, Pierre-Loïc Garoche, Florent Manni
publish: 2025 IEEE 11th International Conference on Space Mission Challenges for Information Technology (SMC-IT)
abstract: The configuration of Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) within the context of command law implementation for aerospace systems is a complex process. In a previous work, we proposed the use of dataflow programming languages as the input for the synthesis process and as an alternative to traditional hardware programming languages. The proposed translation flow has been demonstrated to be faster than current state-of-the-art tools while simultaneously offering greater predictability in the inferred hardware component of the design. This paper extends this previous work, addressing identified challenges. A first one is related to the use of a generated circuit to perform Guidance, Navigation and Control (GNC) functions: the generated netlist requires synchronization to be used within a closed-loop system. A second one concerns the generation of circuits for custom datatypes: target descriptions must be automatically generated to facilitate technology mapping. As a consequence, a novel toolchain is proposed, providing the capability to generate synchronised circuits with arbitrary precision for computation.
title_zh: PYXIS：一种高度可预测的FPGA电路生成工具链，用于先进制导、导航与控制算法
abstract_zh: 在航空航天系统命令法实施的背景下，现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）的配置是一个复杂的过程。在之前的研究工作中，我们提出使用数据流编程语言作为综合过程的输入，并将其作为传统硬件编程语言的一种替代方案。所提出的转换流程已被证明比当前最先进的工具更快，同时在推断出的硬件组件设计方面提供了更高的可预测性。本文进一步扩展了此前的工作，解决了已识别的若干挑战。第一个挑战与利用生成的电路实现制导、导航与控制（GNC）功能相关：生成的网表需要进行同步处理，才能在闭环系统中使用。第二个挑战涉及为自定义数据类型生成电路：必须自动产生目标描述，以促进技术映射。因此，本文提出了一种新型工具链，能够生成具备任意精度计算能力且经过同步处理的电路。

title: PenAgent: A Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Agent Framework for Automated Penetration Testing
authors: Qihui Liu, Chen Feng, Kexin Zhu, Zhide Chen
publish: 2026 5th International Symposium on Computer Applications and Information Technology (ISCAIT)
abstract: Penetration testing is critical for identifying system vulnerabilities. Traditional manual methods, however, are laborintensive and rely heavily on scarce expert knowledge. Existing automated tools often require complete network visibility or specific pre-trained models, limiting their applicability in blackbox scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose PenAgent, a MetaGPT-based multi-agent framework that automates the entire penetration testing lifecycle. The system coordinates four specialized agents to perform reconnaissance, scanning, exploitation, and logic optimization via Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). We evaluated PenAgent against ten N-day vulnerabilities, demonstrating that GPT-4-based agents achieved an exploitation success rate exceeding 80%. Furthermore, RAG integration significantly boosted the performance of smaller models (e.g., GPT-3.5-turbo) to levels comparable with GPT-4. These findings underscore the potential of collaborative LLM agents in autonomous security assessments.
title_zh: PenAgent：一种用于自动化渗透测试的检索增强型多智能体框架
abstract_zh: 渗透测试对于识别系统漏洞至关重要。然而，传统的手动方法不仅耗时费力，还高度依赖稀缺的专业知识。现有的自动化工具通常需要完整的网络可见性或特定的预训练模型，这限制了它们在黑盒场景中的适用性。为解决这些局限性，我们提出了PenAgent——一种基于MetaGPT的多智能体框架，可自动化完成整个渗透测试生命周期。该系统通过检索增强生成（RAG）技术协调四个专业智能体，分别执行侦察、扫描、利用和逻辑优化任务。我们在十种N-day漏洞上对PenAgent进行了评估，结果表明基于GPT-4的智能体实现了超过80%的漏洞利用成功率。此外，RAG的引入显著提升了小型模型（如GPT-3.5-turbo）的性能，使其达到与GPT-4相当的水平。这些发现凸显了协作式大语言模型智能体在自主安全评估中的巨大潜力。

title: Fine-Tuning Open-Source Large Language Models for Cybersecurity and IT Support: A Comparative Study on LLM Fine-Tuning Techniques
authors: Chaithanya Vamshi Sai, Nouh Sabri Elmitwally, Iain Rice, Haitham Mahmoud, Ian Vickers, Xavier Schmoor
publish: IEEE Open Journal of the Computer Society
abstract: The focus of Artificial Intelligence (AI) has progressed from exploring whether Large Language Models (LLMs) can transform domain-specific tasks to understanding how to optimise their impact. Advances in Natural Language Processing (NLP) have enabled LLMs to address complex tasks such as question answering, text classification, and translation with notable accuracy and efficiency. Hence, this study evaluates the effectiveness of fine-tuning open-source LLMs, which range from 2 to 9 billion parameters, for cybersecurity and IT support using three advanced techniques: Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA), and Quantised Low-Rank Adaptation (QLoRA). The results indicate that SFT achieves superior convergence in loss metrics for both tasks, while LoRA and QLoRA significantly reduce GPU memory and computational costs by 99% and 60%, respectively, with comparable performance. Models such as Llama, Mistral, and Phi consistently demonstrated high generalisation across all methods, making them particularly suitable for deployment in resource-constrained environments.
title_zh: 开源大型语言模型在网络安全与IT支持领域的微调：LLM微调技术的对比研究
abstract_zh: 人工智能（AI）的研究重点已从最初探讨大型语言模型（LLMs）能否变革特定领域任务，转向如何优化其实际影响。自然语言处理（NLP）领域的进展使大型语言模型在问答、文本分类和翻译等复杂任务中展现出显著的准确性和效率。因此，本研究评估了三种先进方法——监督微调（SFT）、低秩适应（LoRA）以及量化低秩适应（QLoRA）——在网络安全与IT支持任务中对开源大型语言模型（参数量介于20亿至90亿之间）进行微调的有效性。结果表明，SFT在两项任务中均实现了更优的损失收敛性能；而LoRA与QLoRA分别将GPU内存占用和计算成本降低了99%和60%，同时保持了相近的性能表现。Llama、Mistral和Phi等模型在所有方法中均表现出优异的泛化能力，使其特别适用于资源受限环境中的部署。

title: TopoSizing: An LLM-aided Framework of Topology-based Understanding and Sizing for AMS Circuits
authors: Ziming Wei, Zichen Kong, Yuan Wang, David Z. Pan, Xiyuan Tang
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: Analog and mixed-signal (AMS) circuit design remains challenging due to the shortage of high-quality data and the difficulty of embedding domain knowledge into automated flows. Traditional black-box optimization achieves sampling efficiency but lacks circuit understanding, which often causes evaluations to be wasted in low-value regions of the design space. In contrast, learning-based methods embed structural knowledge but are case-specific and costly to retrain. Recent attempts with large language models (LLMs) show potential, yet they often rely on manual intervention, limiting generality and transparency. We propose TopoSizing, an end-to-end framework that performs robust circuit understanding directly from raw netlists and translates this knowledge into optimization gains. Our approach first applies graph algorithms to organize circuits into a hierarchical device–module–stage representation. LLM agents then execute an iterative hypothesis–verification–refinement loop with built-in consistency checks, producing explicit annotations. Verified insights are integrated into Bayesian optimization (BO) through LLM-guided initial sampling and stagnation-triggered trust-region updates, improving efficiency while preserving feasibility. On four real-world AMS circuits (OTA, FC-OTA, SACMP, LDO) in a 55-nm CMOS process, TopoSizing achieves 100% correctness in circuit understanding and parameter assignment. In constraint-satisfaction tasks, it delivers 1.4×–4.8× higher sample efficiency and 1.2×–3.5× faster runtime compared with strong baselines, while requiring 2–4× fewer LLM calls than prior LLM-based frameworks. Ablation studies confirm that reliable circuit understanding is essential for these gains.
title_zh: TopoSizing：一种基于拓扑理解与尺寸设计的模拟集成电路（AMS）智能辅助框架
abstract_zh: 模拟与混合信号（AMS）电路设计依然面临挑战，主要源于高质量数据的匮乏以及将领域知识嵌入自动化流程的困难。传统黑箱优化方法虽具备较高的采样效率，但缺乏对电路本质的理解，常导致评估过程在设计空间中低价值区域浪费资源。相比之下，基于学习的方法能够融入结构化知识，却往往具有特定案例依赖性，且重训练成本高昂。近期采用大语言模型（LLM）的尝试展现出一定潜力，但通常仍需大量人工干预，限制了其通用性与透明度。我们提出TopoSizing——一种端到端框架，可直接从原始网表中实现鲁棒的电路理解，并将该知识转化为优化性能的提升。我们的方法首先利用图算法将电路组织为分层的器件-模块-阶段表示结构；随后，LLM代理执行迭代式的假设-验证-修正循环，并内置一致性检查机制，生成明确的标注信息。经过验证的洞察被整合进贝叶斯优化（BO）流程中，通过LLM引导的初始采样以及停滞触发的信任域更新策略，在保持可行性的同时显著提升优化效率。在55纳米CMOS工艺下四个真实世界AMS电路（OTA、FC-OTA、SACMP、LDO）上的实验表明，TopoSizing实现了100%的电路理解与参数分配正确率。在约束满足任务中，其样本效率比强基线高出1.4至4.8倍，运行速度提升1.2至3.5倍，同时相比先前基于LLM的框架，仅需2至4倍更少的LLM调用次数。消融实验进一步证实，可靠的电路理解是实现这些性能提升的关键前提。

title: Machine Learning Algorithms for FPGA Implementation in Software Engineering Applications
authors: Rohith Goura, Rambabu Penugonda, Jyothi Swaroop Arlagadda N
abstract: This research investigates the FPGA (Field Programmable Gate Array) implementation of lightweight machine learning algorithms for software engineering applications, focusing on software defect prediction. Models, including Decision Trees and Shallow Neural Networks, were developed and evaluated on a real-world dataset. Software simulation metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score were analyzed, alongside FPGA synthesis results involving latency, power consumption, and resource usage. Experimental results demonstrate that Shallow Neural Networks offer superior prediction accuracy, while Decision Trees provide more efficient hardware deployment. The study highlights a complete design flow from software model training to FPGA implementation, supporting real-time, energy-efficient software quality monitoring.
title_zh: 面向软件工程应用的FPGA实现机器学习算法
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了轻量级机器学习算法在现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）上的实现，应用于软件工程领域中的软件缺陷预测。研究构建并评估了包括决策树和浅层神经网络在内的多种模型，基于真实世界数据集进行分析。除了对软件仿真指标如准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数进行评估外，还分析了FPGA综合结果中的延迟、功耗和资源使用情况。实验结果表明，浅层神经网络在预测准确性方面表现更优，而决策树则在硬件部署效率上更具优势。该研究展示了从软件模型训练到FPGA实现的完整设计流程，支持实时、低功耗的软件质量监控。

title: KRPKI-RAG: Knowledge Refinement and Potential Knowledge Integration for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
authors: Mengwei Zhang, Xizhong Qin, Zhenhong Jia, Siyuan Wang, Weifang Yang
publish: 2026 5th International Symposium on Computer Applications and Information Technology (ISCAIT)
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) achieve strong results on knowledge-intensive tasks but remain prone to hallucinations in domain-specific question-answering tasks. Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) mitigates this issue by leveraging external knowledge; however, it suffers from noisy retrieval results and faces difficulty in balancing denoising with information retention. To address these challenges, we propose KRPKIRAG, a novel question answering framework that integrates Knowledge Refinement and Potential Knowledge Integration for Retrieval-Augmented Generation. The system first employs a knowledge refinement module to filter noisy passages while retaining high-value content. Subsequently, it applies potential knowledge integration to re-examine passages initially deemed noisy or ambiguous to determine whether they should be retained. Experiments on multiple question-answering datasets demonstrate consistent improvements in F1 and Exact Match (EM) scores, highlighting the effectiveness and generalizability of the proposed method.
title_zh: KRPKI-RAG：用于检索增强生成的知识提炼与潜在知识融合
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在知识密集型任务中表现出色，但在特定领域的问题回答任务中仍容易产生幻觉。检索增强生成（RAG）通过利用外部知识来缓解这一问题，但其仍面临检索结果噪声多以及去噪与信息保留之间难以平衡的挑战。为解决这些问题，我们提出了一种名为KRPKIRAG的新颖问答框架，该框架结合了知识精炼（Knowledge Refinement）与潜在知识融合（Potential Knowledge Integration）机制，用于检索增强生成。系统首先通过知识精炼模块过滤噪声段落，同时保留高价值内容；随后，采用潜在知识融合机制重新审视最初被判定为噪声或模糊的段落，以判断其是否应被保留。在多个问答数据集上的实验表明，该方法在F1和精确匹配（EM）得分上均实现了持续提升，充分验证了所提方法的有效性与通用性。

title: Beyond Content Filtering: A “Circuit Breaker” Architecture for Autonomous Agent Action Safety
authors: Harini Sridharan, Reshma Nair
abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) evolve into “Agentic AI,” they are increasingly granted access to external tools and APIs to perform autonomous tasks. While significant research exists on filtering toxic textual output, there is a critical lack of safety mechanisms for functional execution. A hallucinating agent with write-access to a database or financial gateway poses a catastrophic risk that standard content moderation cannot mitigate. This paper introduces the “Action Circuit Breaker” (ACB), a deterministic middleware layer that sits between the LLM agent and external APIs. The ACB evaluates each structured action request against an explicit risk policy before execution. We provide (i) a minimal prototype design of an ACB deployed in front of REST endpoints and (ii) a simulation illustrating blocked vs. allowed actions, alongside a theoretical analysis of latency overhead <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$(<100 \text{ms}$</tex> per hop in typical gateway settings) and risk reduction subject to policy correctness and coverage.
title_zh: 超越内容过滤：一种用于自主代理行为安全的“电路断路器”架构
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）逐步演变为“代理型人工智能”（Agentic AI），它们被赋予越来越多访问外部工具和API的能力，以执行自主任务。尽管已有大量研究聚焦于过滤有毒文本输出，但在功能执行层面却缺乏关键的安全机制。一个具有写入权限的、产生幻觉的智能体若能访问数据库或金融网关，将带来灾难性风险，而传统的内容审核手段无法有效应对此类威胁。本文提出“操作熔断器”（Action Circuit Breaker, ACB），一种确定性的中间件层，位于LLM代理与外部API之间。ACB在执行前对每项结构化操作请求进行评估，确保其符合明确的风险政策。本文提供了：(i) 一个部署在REST端点前的ACB最小原型设计；(ii) 通过模拟展示被阻止与被允许的操作案例，并对延迟开销（在典型网关环境下每跳低于100毫秒）及风险降低效果进行了理论分析，该效果依赖于策略的正确性和覆盖范围。

title: Privacy Without Compromise: Benchmarking Local Open-Weight LLMs for Financial Data Extraction
authors: Yash Sharma
abstract: Financial data extraction has traditionally required a compromise: sacrificing data privacy for the convenience and assumed superior accuracy of cloud-based solutions. We challenge this paradigm by benchmarking local open-weight LLMs on consumer-grade hardware (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\leq 18 \text{GB}$</tex> VRAM). Using a 752 -transactions proprietary dataset, we evaluated <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{5 6}$</tex> model configurations across syntactic compliance, extraction accuracy, and semantic categorization. We distinguish between ‘hallucination’ and ‘filter failure’ in financial contexts, revealing that specific models (e.g., Ministral 3, Qwen 3) can match state-of-the-art accuracy. Our findings demonstrate that high-fidelity financial parsing does not require a trade-off between data sovereignty and extraction precision.
title_zh: 无需妥协的隐私：面向金融数据提取的本地开源大模型基准测试
abstract_zh: 金融数据提取传统上需要在数据隐私与云解决方案的便利性及所谓更高的准确性之间做出权衡。我们挑战了这一范式，通过在消费级硬件（显存 ≤18 GB）上对本地开源权重大模型进行基准测试。基于一个包含752笔交易的专有数据集，我们评估了56种模型配置在语法合规性、提取准确性和语义分类方面的表现。我们区分了金融场景中的“幻觉”与“过滤失败”，发现某些特定模型（如Ministral 3、Qwen 3）能够达到顶尖水平的准确率。研究结果表明，高保真金融数据解析无需在数据主权与提取精度之间做出妥协。

title: A Multi-Level Intelligent Framework for Unknown Vulnerability Capture and Alert Screening
authors: Jiming Bai, Baojiang Cui, Wenchuan Yang
publish: 2026 5th International Symposium on Computer Applications and Information Technology (ISCAIT)
abstract: Addressing the limitations of current detection methods against complex threats like APTs, we propose a four-layer intelligent framework. It integrates a Base Platform for efficient high-speed traffic filtering; a Vulnerability Discovery System targeting unknown zero-day exploits (e.g., command injection, buffer overflow); an Alert Aggregation System to minimize false positives; and a Deep Analysis System utilizing semantic models for threat interpretation. This architecture effectively resolves challenges in real-time processing and high-dimensional data analysis, significantly enhancing vulnerability capture accuracy.
title_zh: 一种多层级智能框架用于未知漏洞的捕获与告警筛选
abstract_zh: 针对当前检测方法在应对高级持续性威胁（APT）等复杂威胁时的局限性，我们提出了一种四层智能框架。该框架集成了基础平台，用于实现高效高速的流量过滤；漏洞发现系统，专注于识别未知的零日漏洞（如命令注入、缓冲区溢出）；告警聚合系统，以最大限度减少误报；以及深度分析系统，利用语义模型进行威胁解读。该架构有效解决了实时处理与高维数据分析的挑战，显著提升了漏洞捕获的准确性。
